meta_title: Giant Screen Hire for Open-Air Cinemas & Events
meta_desc: Inflatable giant screen hire for open-air cinema screenings, festivals or corporate events. Turnkey installation throughout France, free quote.
photo_alt: Open-air cinema screening on an inflatable screen at the Hallucine evening event
hero_title: Hire a giant screen for your event
hero_desc: A one-off event doesn’t always warrant a purchase. For a one-off screening — whether it’s a festival, an open-air screening or a corporate event — hiring gives you access to the right Hallucine screen for the duration of your event.
cta_buy: Fancy buying one? Take a look at our screens
why_desc: Renting is ideal for one-off needs, whilst buying is best for regular use. Here’s when renting makes sense.
w1_desc: For a one-off or occasional screening, hiring avoids the need to buy the equipment whilst providing you with the right screen.
w2_desc: No equipment to store or maintain between uses — you receive equipment that’s ready to use.
w3_desc: You’ll benefit from the lightest screens on the market, ranging from 2 to 24 metres, as well as our installation advice.
s1_desc: Date, venue, number of attendees, indoor or outdoor: please provide us with the key details of your event.
s2_desc: We can recommend the right screen for you and provide a personalised rental quote.
s3_desc: The screen and its accessories will be delivered to you before the date of your event.
s4_desc: Quick and easy to set up — taking between 10 and 90 minutes depending on the size — and then it’s time for the screening.
note: The rental terms and conditions — duration, delivery, installation, deposit — are agreed with you when the quote is provided.
tarifs_desc: Indicative prices by event size, for a one-off hire. The final cost depends on the duration, venue and logistics.
tarifs_note: Prices are indicative and exclude VAT and delivery. The quote specifies the hire period, delivery, installation and the deposit.
cta_desc: Tell us about your project: we’ll suggest the right screen for you and provide a rental quote.
